revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23127601988|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Box-shadow_border here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Box-shadow_border for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{#switch:{{{1|all}}}
  | a | all | #default = box-shadow: inset {{{w|{{{3|1px}}}}}} {{{w|{{{3|1px}}}}}} 0 {{{c1|{{{c|{{{2|#000}}}}}}}}}, inset -{{{w|{{{3|1px}}}}}} -{{{w|{{{3|1px}}}}}} 0 {{{c2|{{{c|{{{2|#000}}}}}}}}};
  | t | top = box-shadow: inset 0 {{{w|{{{3|1px}}}}}} 0 0 {{{c|{{{2|#000}}}}}};
  | b | bottom = box-shadow: inset 0 -{{{w|{{{3|1px}}}}}} 0 0 {{{c|{{{2|#000}}}}}};
  | tb | bt | top bottom | bottom top = box-shadow: inset 0 {{{w|{{{3|1px}}}}}} 0 0 {{{c1|{{{c|{{{2|#000}}}}}}}}}, inset 0 -{{{w|{{{3|1px}}}}}} 0 0 {{{c2|{{{c|{{{2|#000}}}}}}}}};
  | lr | rl | left right | right left = box-shadow: inset {{{w|{{{3|1px}}}}}} 0 0 0 {{{c1|{{{c|{{{2|#000}}}}}}}}}, inset -{{{w|{{{3|1px}}}}}} 0 0 0 {{{c2|{{{c|{{{2|#000}}}}}}}}};
  | l | left = box-shadow: inset {{{w|{{{3|1px}}}}}} 0 0 0 {{{c|{{{2|#000}}}}}};
  | r | right = box-shadow: inset -{{{w|{{{3|1px}}}}}} 0 0 0 {{{c|{{{2|#000}}}}}};
}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]

[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
